name: hdim-accelerator
description: Comprehensive HDIM development accelerator with 10 proactive agents (HIPAA Compliance, FHIR, CQL Measure Builder, Spring Boot, Spring Security, Redis, PostgreSQL, Kafka, Docker, GCP), event-driven CQRS scaffolding, entity-migration synchronization, and healthcare compliance automation
author: HDIM Platform Team

proactive_validation.description: Enable proactive schema and security validation

auto_generate_tests.description: Automatically generate test stubs for new components

hipaa_strict_mode.description: Enforce strict HIPAA compliance checks (PHI cache TTL, audit logging)

hooks.PreToolUse: Auto-detect file modifications and launch specialized technology agents
hooks.Stop: Verify HDIM quality standards before task completion
hooks.SessionStart: Load HDIM platform context and environment configuration
